package rulecoverage

func PositiveSelectWithSingleCase() string {
    ruleID := "select_with_single_case"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`select { case v := <-ch: ... }` with only one case and no default"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
